project_area: Life sciences and deep tech startups, including innovations in diagnostics, synthetic biology, digital health, and caregiving technology
demographic_requirements: None specified; open to eligible SBIR/STTR awardees
eligibility_summary: Eligible applicants are Massachusetts-based startups that have received SBIR or STTR grants and are converting their research into businesses and jobs in the Commonwealth. The program targets early-stage deep tech and life science companies.
